creative_direction.reasoning: Typography is the hero (5-beat rhythmic headline + dollar anchor + black CTA pill), but the ad requires two distinctive visual elements: a hand-painted green highlighter marker behind 'Your way' and a bottom illustration of 3 people + a dog around an orange book. Both are hard to generate reliably — Track B mandatory, highlighter and illustration composited from brand kit for fidelity.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Four-verb rhythmic headline ending on a hand-highlighted 'Your way', anchored by a line-art group illustration.

prompt_track_A_full_bake.description: Full bake including hand-highlighted Your way and bottom illustration.

nano_banana_json.scene: Saturated warm yellow canvas. Upper half is a three-line black ExtraBold sans headline with 'Your way' on the third line wrapped in a hand-painted grass-green highlighter rectangle. Below: 'Get up to $12,000 of free Notion' in smaller sans. Then a black pill CTA. Bottom 30%: hand-drawn line-art of 3 people + an orange book + a dog in Notion's house illustration style.

composition.layout_archetype: centered editorial poster with hand-drawn accent
vertical_zones: Top 7%: Notion N logo + wordmark, small, centered
Top 14-45%: three-line ExtraBold headline, third line 'Your way' highlighted
Center 47-53%: 'Get up to $12,000 of free Notion' SemiBold sans
Bottom 35%: line-art illustration of 3 people + orange book + dog

illustration_spec.style: Notion house line art, hand-drawn imperfect strokes, flat fills
illustration_spec.content: Three figures standing around a large open orange book held up by the middle figure. Left figure: woman with curly hair in patterned sweater, holding a magnifying glass. Center: man with short hair in white shirt holding book. Right: woman with curly black hair, arms at sides. In front/below: a small orange-brown dog lying down facing left. Thin 2px black strokes, flat color fills for clothing and hair.

negative_prompt: highlighter must NOT look like a clean rectangle — must have painterly imperfect edges

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Yellow canvas + illustration + highlighter. All text overlaid in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Saturated warm yellow (#FFD63A) canvas 1080x1080. Small Notion N logo + wordmark top-center (7%). In the vertical band y:38-45% there is a hand-painted grass-green (#8BC34A) irregular horizontal rectangle brush stroke, approximately 380px wide centered horizontally, with painterly imperfect edges and slight opacity variation — this is a highlighter mark behind text that will be composited on top. Bottom 35% contains a Notion-house-style line-art illustration: 3 figures standing around an open orange book, with a small dog in front. Thin 2px black strokes on flat color fills.
negative_prompt: no CTA text — only visuals (canvas, highlighter mark, illustration)

assets.name: Hand-painted green highlighter mark
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: A grass-green (#8BC34A) rectangular brush stroke, ~380px wide, painterly imperfect edges with visible brush-mark texture, slight opacity drop at left and right ends (70%), like someone swept a wide highlighter across the canvas once.
assets.fidelity_confidence: low — image-gen tends to make clean rectangles; composite recommended

assets.name: Three-figures-around-an-orange-book illustration
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Notion house-style line art: 3 figures (left: woman w/ curly hair, patterned sweater, magnifying glass; center: man w/ short hair holding open orange book; right: woman w/ curly black hair) with a small orange-brown dog lying in front. Thin consistent 2px black strokes, flat color fills, imperfect organic edges. Book cover is saturated orange (#FF7F2B).

patterns_exemplified: DP-14 hand-painted accent on flat layout
prompt_writer_training_notes: Highlighter mark is the single creative flourish — ALWAYS call out 'painterly imperfect edges' and 'visible brush-mark texture' or image gen produces a flat rectangle. Yellow (#FFD63A) is audience-signal for creator/youth — never sub with pastel yellow. 4-beat verb rhythm in headline: each 'verb it.' must be preserved with periods.
